octolysis_themes.reasoning: Participating in a community of collectors aligns with their dominant propensity for gamification
Streaks, XP, and levels motivate collectors to make progress and master skills
Practice → feedback loop allows collectors to take control of their learning
Progress dashboard gives collectors a sense of ownership and investment in the game
Leaderboards and sharing wins tap into collectors' desire for social connection and status
Limited trial days create a sense of urgency and FOMO among collectors
New daily scenarios keep the game fresh and exciting for collectors
Streak reminders motivate collectors to maintain their progress and avoid losing momentum
Low activation and lack of community features
